markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between Goodcall and GrowthX to align on SEO strategy and content development priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - Goodcall aims to reach $5M ARR this year, with SEO as their \#1 marketing bet
  - [Current focus is on mid-market/enterprise customers with in-house call centers (5-100 seats)](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Strategy: Enrich existing content clusters while exploring new verticals (e.g. insurance, PBMs, salons)](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Balancing SMB roots with enterprise growth potential; open to strategic pivots based on SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=3606.0)

## Topics

### Goodcall's Growth Goals and Current State

  - [Targeting $5M ARR, up from current $1.4M (potentially $2M this quarter)](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Shift towards enterprise clients (e.g., Night Swift Transit, Home Depot)](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Organic traffic: \~3.1k clicks/day, 8k clicks over past 3 months (Google Search Console)](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [518 published pages, largely unoptimized since initial creation](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)

### SEO Strategy and Priorities

  - [P0: Enrich and optimize existing content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=2013.0)
  - [Explore new verticals while maintaining SMB focus](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=2053.0)
  - [Potential for directory-style pages for local businesses (inspired by Setmore's success)](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=2692.0)
  - [Balance between highly competitive enterprise keywords and long-tail SMB opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)

### Product Use Cases and Integration

  - [AI-powered booking system (e.g., hair salons, contractors)](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [Integration with popular scheduling tools (e.g., Setmore, Squire)](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
  - [Expanding into enterprise use cases (e.g., PBMs, insurance companies)](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [25% conversion rate on link-based bookings, 75% on direct AI bookings](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=2427.0)

### Content Development Approach

  - [Leverage AI for research and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Potential for using Goodcall's AI to validate/enrich business listings](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=2896.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, detailed pages that outperform competitors](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Performance Metrics and Goals

  - [Increase domain authority from 41 to over 50](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)
  - [Aim for 1-2 million monthly unique visitors](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Track product activation rate (currently \~15% for PLG)](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
  - [Monitor high-value lead generation from organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to rerun company research with correct domain to avoid inaccuracies](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Goodcall to provide access to Google Search Console and other relevant tools](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [GrowthX to analyze existing content clusters and identify optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1336.0)
  - [Explore potential for new content verticals, balancing SMB and enterprise focus](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=2124.0)
  - [Bob to keep an eye out for valuable customer insights during sales calls/demos](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=3340.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to discuss findings and refine content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xpdsd8-oHMNwnJcKGE8ejHGy5p57jmPf?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
